esp_bridge_outdated.title: ESP bridge firmware update required
esp_bridge_outdated.description:
Your ESP bridge is running **v{version}**, but **v{min_version}** or newer is required for full functionality.

Rebuild and flash your ESPHome device to get the latest firmware.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm Philips Sonicare
bluetooth_confirm.description:
**{name}** discovered at `{address}` via Direct Bluetooth.

Make sure your toothbrush is **turned on** (press the button), then click **Submit**.

user.title: Add Philips Sonicare
user.description: Choose how to connect to your toothbrush.

user_bleak.title: Direct Bluetooth
user_bleak.description:
Select or enter BLE address of your Sonicare toothbrush.

**Important:** Turn on your toothbrush before clicking Submit. The brush must be active during setup so that services can be read.

esp_bridge.title: ESP32 Bridge (ESPHome)
esp_bridge.description: Select the ESPHome device that acts as the BLE bridge for your toothbrush.

data_description.esp_device_name: The ESPHome device that runs the Philips Sonicare BLE bridge component.

esp_select_device.title: Select BLE Device
esp_select_device.description: This ESP bridge has multiple Philips devices connected. Select the device you want to add.

esp_bridge_status.title: Connection via ESP32 Bridge

not_paired.title: BLE Pairing Required
not_paired.description:
Your toothbrush at `{address}` requires **BLE bonding** before characteristics can be read. Auto-pairing was not successful.

Please pair manually via SSH:

```
bluetoothctl pair {address}
bluetoothctl trust {address}
```

Make sure the toothbrush is **awake** (press button) while pairing. Then click **Retry**.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the toothbrush. Make sure it is awake (press button or place on charger) and in range.
error.pairing_failed: Device is still not paired. Make sure the toothbrush is awake and try pairing again.
error.no_esphome_devices: No ESPHome devices found. Please set up an ESPHome device with the BLE bridge component first.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress.

data_description.sensor_pressure: Stream pressure data during brushing sessions (0x01).
data_description.sensor_temperature: Stream temperature data during brushing sessions (0x02).
data_description.sensor_gyroscope: Stream 6-axis IMU data during brushing sessions (0x04). High bandwidth — may impact ESP performance.
data_description.notify_throttle_ms: Minimum interval between BLE notification events forwarded by the ESP bridge. Lower values give faster updates but may overload the ESP. Only applies to ESP32 bridge connections.
